title: Walkers set off on last day of Vierdaagse; 42,450 people finished hardest 3rd day
title_zh: 徒步者们在维尔达格斯的最后一天出发；42450人完成了最艰难的第三天。
description: The final day of the Nijmegen Vierdaagse takes the walkers to Cuijk, across a pontoon bridge constructed by the Ministry of Defense in the Maas River, to finally begin the kilometers-long
description_zh: 奈梅亨四日徒步活动的最后一天，徒步者们将抵达库伊克，穿过国防部在马斯河上建造的一座浮桥，最终开始长达数公里的徒步之旅。

title: New U.S. import tariffs: Netherlands facing 10% along with other EU Member States
title_zh: 美国新进口关税：荷兰与其他欧盟成员国一样，将面临10%的关税
description: The United States has announced new import tariffs of 10 percent and 12.5 percent on 60 trading partners, including the Netherlands and other European Union Member States.
description_zh: 美国宣布对包括荷兰和其他欧盟成员国在内的 60 个贸易伙伴加征 10% 和 12.5% 的新进口关税。

title: Netherlands to implement points system for unsafe driving
title_zh: 荷兰将对不安全驾驶行为实施积分制
description: The police and judiciary are going to implement a points system for unsafe driving.
description_zh: 警方和司法部门将对不安全驾驶行为实施积分制。

title: Drowning risk 14 times higher for teens born outside Europe
title_zh: 在欧洲以外出生的青少年溺水风险高出14倍。
description: Of the people living in the Netherlands, children and teenagers born outside Europe are much more likely to drown than their Dutch counterparts.
description_zh: 在荷兰居住的人群中，出生于欧洲以外的儿童和青少年比荷兰本土儿童和青少年更容易溺水身亡。

title: Night-time ban on entering Rotterdam neighbourhood begins
title_zh: 鹿特丹开始实施夜间禁止进入该街区的禁令
description: Anyone in large parts of the Rotterdam neighbourhood of De Esch at night without a good reason to be there...
description_zh: 任何人在夜间没有正当理由出现在鹿特丹德埃施区的大部分区域……

title: Drowning risk far higher for children born outside Europe: CBS
title_zh: 哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）称，在欧洲以外出生的儿童溺水风险远高于其他地区。
description: Children born outside Europe are far more likely to drown in the Netherlands than children of Dutch origin, figures published...
description_zh: 公布的数据显示，在欧洲以外出生的儿童在荷兰溺水的概率远高于荷兰本土儿童……

title: Dutch business investments fall 3.8% in May
title_zh: 荷兰5月份企业投资下降3.8%。
description: Business investments in the Netherlands decreased for the second consecutive month in May, falling 3.8 percent compared with the same month a year earlier, Statistics Netherlands (CBS)
description_zh: 荷兰统计局（CBS）数据显示，5月份荷兰商业投资连续第二个月下降，同比下降3.8%。

title: 13-year-old arrested in Spijkenisse for posing as officer, stealing €20,000 in jewelry
title_zh: 一名13岁少年在斯派克尼瑟因冒充警察盗窃价值2万欧元的珠宝而被捕。
description: Police arrested a 13-year-old boy from Spijkenisse on suspicion of posing as a police officer and taking a pin card plus jewelry valued at more than 20,000 euros from at least one victim.
description_zh: 警方逮捕了一名来自斯派克尼瑟的 13 岁男孩，他涉嫌冒充警察，从至少一名受害者那里抢走了一张密码卡和价值超过 20,000 欧元的珠宝。

title: Dutch households spend more on energy, fuel than in 2022 crisis
title_zh: 荷兰家庭在能源和燃料上的支出比2022年危机时期更多。
description: Dutch households are spending more on energy and fuel than they did four years ago during the 2022 energy crisis.
description_zh: 荷兰家庭在能源和燃料上的支出比四年前（2022 年能源危机期间）要多。

title: Groningen man who threatened butcher shop employees with death gets 10-month sentence
title_zh: 格罗宁根男子威胁肉店员工要杀掉他们，被判处10个月监禁。
description: A 23-year-old man from Nieuwolda who threatened employees of 13 butcher shops in Groningen and Drenthe with death if they did not permanently close their stores has been sentenced to 10 months in p
description_zh: 一名来自尼乌沃尔达的23岁男子威胁格罗宁根和德伦特省13家肉店的员工，如果他们不永久关闭店铺，就杀了他们。该男子被判处10个月监禁。

title: Escaped monkey from Beekse Bergen gets caught after month on the run
title_zh: 从贝克瑟贝尔根逃脱的猴子在逃亡一个月后被抓获
description: A 4-year-old male crested mangabey thatescapedfrom the Safaripark Beekse Bergen last month is back in th
description_zh: 上个月从贝克斯贝尔根野生动物园逃脱的一只4岁雄性冠白眉猴已经返回。

title: Administrative error allows far-right GNSV to return to Radboud University welcome fair
title_zh: 行政失误导致极右翼组织GNSV重返拉德堡德大学迎新会。
description: Radboud University has accidentally allowed the far-right Groot-Nederlandse Studentenvereniging (GNSV) to participate in this year’s student introduction market.
description_zh: 拉德布德大学意外地允许极右翼的荷兰学生联合会（GNSV）参加今年的学生介绍市场。

title: Appeals court also acquits four "tattoo killers" of 2009 murder
title_zh: 上诉法院还宣判四名“纹身杀手”2009年谋杀案无罪。
description: The four suspects in the murder of Onno Kuut in March 2009 were also acquitted by the Court of Appeal on Thursday.
description_zh: 2009 年 3 月 Onno Kuut 谋杀案的四名嫌疑人于周四被上诉法院宣告无罪。

title: Police arrest Noord-Holland man for urging underage girls to self-harm online
title_zh: 警方逮捕了一名北荷兰省男子，该男子涉嫌在网上怂恿未成年女孩自残。
description: Police in the Netherlands have arrested a man from Noord-Holland on suspicion of encouraging underage girls to harm themselves in sadistic online “Com” networks, the Public Prosecution Service
description_zh: 荷兰警方逮捕了一名来自北荷兰省的男子，他涉嫌在虐待成性的网络“Com”中唆使未成年少女自残。

title: Amsterdam police chief pledges safety ahead of WorldPride
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警察局长承诺在世界骄傲节前保障安全
description: Amsterdam police chief Peter Holla opened the COC’s Shakespeare Club at the H’ART Museum on Wednesday, telling dozens of drag...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警察局长彼得·霍拉周三在H'ART博物馆为COC莎士比亚俱乐部揭幕，并向数十位变装皇后发表了讲话……

title: Rotterdam mayor abseils from Euromast despite fear of heights
title_zh: 鹿特丹市长克服恐高症，从欧洲桅杆塔上速降
description: Rotterdam Mayor Carola Schouten descended by rope from theEuromaston Thursday mor
description_zh: 鹿特丹市长卡罗拉·舒滕周四上午从欧洲之都广场用绳索下降。

title: Impetigo cases among Dutch children surge higher and earlier than usual
title_zh: 荷兰儿童脓疱疮病例数量激增，且发病时间比往常更早。
description: In the past three weeks, about 350 to 400 children in the Netherlands per 100,000 have been seen by family doctors for impetigo, a highly contagious skin infection.
description_zh: 在过去三周里，荷兰每 10 万名儿童中约有 350 至 400 名因脓疱疮（一种传染性极强的皮肤感染）而就诊于家庭医生。

title: “The Dutch are still alive and floating despite all this water”
title_zh: “尽管被水淹没，荷兰人依然活着，并且漂浮在水面上。”
description: Originally from Venezuela, Eduardo Petit has lived in the Netherlands for over two decades. He currently works as a legal...
description_zh: 爱德华多·佩蒂特出生于委内瑞拉，在荷兰生活了二十多年。他目前从事法律工作……

title: Union raises alarm over fake care internships giving diplomas without practical training
title_zh: 工会就虚假护理实习项目发出警告，这些项目在没有实际培训的情况下颁发文凭。
description: The General Education Union (AOb) is raising alarm over fraud in mandatory care internships for intermediate vocational education students.
description_zh: 普通教育联盟 (AOb) 对中等职业教育学生强制性护理实习中的欺诈行为发出警告。

title: Hormuz blockade drives 36% surge in oil product exports through Rotterdam port
title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁导致经鹿特丹港的石油产品出口量激增36%。
description: The Port of Rotterdam has benefited from the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, with crude oil handling rising 2 percent and exports of oil products jumping 36 percent in the first half of 2026 from
description_zh: 鹿特丹港受益于霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，预计2026年上半年原油吞吐量将增长2%，石油产品出口量将增长36%。

title: Rising costs force Amsterdam’s Kwaku festival to change
title_zh: 成本上涨迫使阿姆斯特丹的Kwaku音乐节做出改变
description: Due to rising costs and regulatory pressure, this year’s Amsterdam Kwaku Summer Festival will be the last in its current...
description_zh: 由于成本上升和监管压力，今年的阿姆斯特丹夸库夏季音乐节将是其目前形式的最后一届……

title: Unproven policy means less care for young women in crisis
title_zh: 未经证实的政策意味着对处于危机中的年轻女性的关怀减少。
description: A growing group of young women with severe mental illness are getting stuck in the Dutch mental health system, and...
description_zh: 越来越多的患有严重精神疾病的年轻女性被困在荷兰的精神卫生系统中，而且……

title: Travel agencies flooded with calls over Middle East travel warning
title_zh: 旅行社接到大量关于中东旅行警告的电话
description: The Netherlands escalating itstravel advice for the Middle East to code orange
description_zh: 荷兰将对中东的旅行警告级别提升至橙色。

title: Widower files charges against psychiatric clinic over wife's murder by patient
title_zh: 鳏夫就妻子被病人谋杀一事对精神病院提起诉讼。
description: The widower of Willemijn Klijnhout (76) has pressed charges of death through negligence against the Fivoor psychiatric clinic in Den Dolder.
description_zh: Willemijn Klijnhout（76 岁）的遗孀对登多尔德的 Fivoor 精神病诊所提起过失致死诉讼。

title: Fmr. official must pay €380,000 for assigning homes intended for homeless to friends
title_zh: 这位前官员因将原本分配给无家可归者的房屋转让给朋友，必须支付38万欧元的罚款。
description: The court ordered a former civil servant of the municipality of Rotterdam to pay a total of €400,000 in compensation for the housing fraud she committed.
description_zh: 法院判令鹿特丹市政府一名前公务员因其犯下的住房欺诈罪，支付总计 40 万欧元的赔偿金。

title: Sugar high: Food watchdog wants Efteling to stop offering unlimited soft drink refills
title_zh: 糖分过高：食品监管机构要求埃夫特林乐园停止提供无限量软饮料续杯。
description: Foodwatchwants
description_zh: 食品观察员

title: Highly contagious impetigo infection on the rise among children
title_zh: 儿童脓疱疮感染病例呈上升趋势，且传染性极强。
description: The highly contagious skin infection impetigo is on the rise on among Dutch children, with 2026 seeing more cases than...
description_zh: 传染性极强的皮肤感染——脓疱疮在荷兰儿童中呈上升趋势，2026 年的病例数将超过……

title: Summery weather until Sunday, up to 29° in the southeast
title_zh: 周日之前天气晴朗，东南部地区最高气温可达29摄氏度。
description: The Netherlands is in for a run of summery weather, with temperatures climbing towards the weekend before showers arrive on...
description_zh: 荷兰即将迎来一段夏季天气，气温将在周末前持续攀升，之后会有阵雨到来……

title: Ali B cancels talk amid fears of media spectacle
title_zh: 阿里·B因担心媒体报道而取消演讲
description: Rapper and convicted rapist Ali B has pulled out of a business event where he was supposed to be speaking...
description_zh: 说唱歌手兼强奸犯阿里·B取消了原定出席的一场商业活动并发表演讲……

title: Erasmus Bridge reopens after Rotterdam tram collision
title_zh: 鹿特丹电车事故后，伊拉斯谟桥重新开放
description: The Erasmus Bridge in Rotterdam reopened to all traffic on Wednesday evening after the two badly damaged trams which collided...
description_zh: 鹿特丹的伊拉斯谟桥在两辆严重受损的电车相撞后，于周三晚间重新开放通行。

title: Still many unlicensed electric scooters on Dutch roads year after ban
title_zh: 禁令实施一年后，荷兰道路上仍然有很多无牌电动滑板车。
description: Electric scooters without license plates are still being used on Dutch public roads a year after a registration requirement took effect, while many popular models remain ineligible for registration
description_zh: 在荷兰实施注册制度一年后，仍有许多未悬挂牌照的电动滑板车在公共道路上行驶，而许多热门车型仍然无法注册。

title: Amsterdam police chief promises rainbow community will be safe during WorldPride, beyond
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警察局长承诺，在世界骄傲节期间及之后，彩虹社群的安全将得到保障。
description: “Behind all the splendor, the high heels, and the glitter and glamour lies an enormous amount of courage. The courage to be yourself and to show yourself.
description_zh: “在所有的华丽、高跟鞋、闪耀和魅力背后，隐藏着巨大的勇气。做自己、展现自己的勇气。”

title: Energy poverty: Over 500,000 households struggled to pay their energy bills last year
title_zh: 能源贫困：去年有超过50万户家庭难以支付能源账单
description: The number of households struggling to pay their energy bills remained virtually unchanged last year, according to research institute TNO and Statistics Netherlands (CBS).
description_zh: 根据荷兰应用科学研究组织TNO和荷兰统计局（CBS）的数据，去年难以支付能源账单的家庭数量几乎没有变化。

title: Police catching more people driving after their licenses have been confiscated
title_zh: 警方抓获了更多驾照被吊销后仍驾车的人
description: The police are catching more and more people driving a vehicle after their licenses have been confiscated.
description_zh: 警方抓获的在驾照被没收后仍驾驶车辆的人越来越多。

title: Amsterdam's Kwaku Summer Festival calling it quits after 50 years
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹夸库夏季音乐节在举办50年后宣布停办
description: This year will be the last edition of the Kwaku Summer Festival, which takes place over several weekends during the summer vacation in the Nelson Mandela Park in Amsterdam Zuidoost, the o
description_zh: 今年将是夸库夏季音乐节的最后一届，该音乐节在暑假期间的几个周末于阿姆斯特丹东南区的纳尔逊·曼德拉公园举行。

title: Sixteen councils still without a coalition, four months on
title_zh: 四个月过去了，仍有16个地方议会没有组建联合政府。
description: Sixteen Dutch councils still have not formed a government coalition 126 days after the local elections on March 18 –...
description_zh: 3月18日地方选举已过去126天，荷兰仍有16个地方议会尚未组建联合政府——……

title: Half a million Dutch households in energy poverty
title_zh: 荷兰有五十万户家庭处于能源贫困状态。
description: Around 503,000 Dutch households were living in energy poverty last year, or 6% of the total – unchanged from 2024,...
description_zh: 去年，约有50.3万荷兰家庭生活在能源贫困之中，占总数的6%——这一数字与2024年相比没有变化……

title: Apple prices expected to surge as Dutch growers predict poor harvest; Pears thrive
title_zh: 由于荷兰种植户预测苹果收成不佳，预计苹果价格将飙升；梨树则表现良好。
description: Dutch fruit growers are projecting a significantly smaller apple crop this year even as pear production rises sharply, according to industry figures released Monday.
description_zh: 根据周一公布的行业数据显示，尽管梨的产量大幅增长，但荷兰水果种植者预计今年的苹果产量将大幅下降。

title: Former Dutch police officer faces 3 years in prison for alleged rape at a party
title_zh: 一名荷兰前警官因涉嫌在派对上强奸他人，面临三年监禁。
description: The Dutch public prosecutor has demanded a three-year prison sentence, including six months suspended, against a 36-year-old former police officer from Roermond accused of raping a 28-year-old woma
description_zh: 荷兰检察官要求判处一名来自鲁尔蒙德的36岁前警官三年监禁，其中六个月缓刑，他被控强奸一名28岁女子。

title: Nearly half of Dutch businesses affected by Middle East war, survey finds
title_zh: 调查发现，近半数荷兰企业受到中东战争影响。
description: Nearly half of Dutch businesses report that the war in the Middle East and resulting geopolitical tensions have affected their operations, while almost as many say they have not been impacted, acco
description_zh: 近半数荷兰企业表示，中东战争及其引发的地缘政治紧张局势影响了他们的运营，而几乎同样多的企业表示未受影响。

title: Netherlands needs better investment climate to increase rental home construction: DNB
title_zh: 荷兰需要改善投资环境以增加租赁住房建设：荷兰央行
description: To realize its construction ambitions for rental housing, the Netherlands will have to improve its investment climate, De Nederlandsche Bank (DNB) concluded in a study into the financing
description_zh: 荷兰中央银行（DNB）在一项融资研究中得出结论，为了实现其租赁住房建设目标，荷兰必须改善其投资环境。

title: Anthropic trained AI models on Dutch bestsellers without authors' permission: Report
title_zh: 报告称，人为因素未经作者许可，利用人工智能模型对荷兰畅销书进行训练。
description: American artificial intelligence giant Anthropic allegedly used bestselling works from some of the most critically-acclaimed Dutch authors as part of its process to train the company's large langua
description_zh: 据称，美国人工智能巨头Anthropic在其训练公司庞大语言系统的过程中，使用了部分最受好评的荷兰作家的畅销作品。

title: Three held in theft of €5 million of smartphones taken from Schiphol Airport area
title_zh: 三人因涉嫌在史基浦机场附近盗窃价值500万欧元的智能手机而被捕
description: Authorities in the Netherlands have apprehended three suspects in connection with the theft of a shipment of mobile devices valued in the millions.
description_zh: 荷兰当局逮捕了三名嫌疑人，他们涉嫌盗窃一批价值数百万的移动设备。

title: Rotterdam tram operator was not under the influence at time of crash that hurt 15
title_zh: 鹿特丹电车司机在事故发生时并未受到酒精或药物的影响，该事故造成15人受伤。
description: The person who was driving atram which rear-ended a stopped tram on the Erasmus Bridgein Rotterd
description_zh: 在鹿特丹伊拉斯谟桥上，驾驶有轨电车追尾撞上一辆停靠电车的司机

title: Over 5,800 items of ivory, crocodile leather handed in in one year
title_zh: 一年内上交了超过5800件象牙和鳄鱼皮制品
description: Over 5,800 items from protected plant and animal species have been handed in to the Netherlands Enterprise Agency (RVO) over the past year, from July 2025 to the present.
description_zh: 从 2025 年 7 月至今的过去一年里，荷兰企业局 (RVO) 收到了超过 5800 件受保护的动植物物种物品。

title: Rotterdam mayor visits scene of "terrible" tram accident; Seven hospitalized
title_zh: 鹿特丹市长视察“惨烈”电车事故现场；七人住院
description: Rotterdam Mayor Carola Schouten visited the Erasmus Bridge wheretwo RET trams collided
description_zh: 鹿特丹市长卡罗拉·舒滕视察了伊拉斯谟桥，那里曾发生两辆RET有轨电车相撞的事故。

title: Man convicted of randomly killing Den Dolder woman on the street, stabbing her 17 times
title_zh: 一名男子因在街头随机杀害一名登多尔德女子而被定罪，他向她连刺17刀。
description: On Wednesday, the court in Utrecht sentenced Mert P.
description_zh: 周三，乌得勒支法院判处默特·P.

title: Consumers’ assoc. calls out Thuisbezorgd.nl for hidden costs, fake discounts
title_zh: 消费者协会指责Thuisbezorgd.nl存在隐性费用和虚假折扣。
description: The Consumentenbond is calling on the meal delivery platform Thuisbezorgd.nl to stop charging hidden fees.
description_zh: 消费者联盟呼吁送餐平台 Thuisbezorgd.nl 停止收取隐性费用。

title: Ivory and a rhino skull among 5,800 items handed to RVO
title_zh: 移交给皇家维多利亚博物馆的5800件物品中，包括象牙和犀牛头骨。
description: Some 5,800 prohibited objects including elephant ivory have been anonymously handed in to the Netherlands Enterprise Agency (RVO) over the...
description_zh: 约有5800件违禁物品，其中包括象牙，已由匿名人士举报至荷兰企业局（RVO）……

title: Thuisbezorgd hides costs and fakes discounts: consumer group
title_zh: 消费者团体：土耳其家庭护理机构隐瞒成本并虚假宣传折扣
description: The food delivery platform Thuisbezorgd.nl hides compulsory charges and advertises fake discounts, the Dutch consumer association Consumentenbond said on Tuesday,...
description_zh: 荷兰消费者协会Consumentenbond周二表示，外卖平台Thuisbezorgd.nl隐瞒强制性费用并宣传虚假折扣……

title: Dutch baby names significantly shorter than 50 years ago; Noah and Noor most popular
title_zh: 荷兰婴儿名字比50年前短了很多；诺亚和努尔最受欢迎
description: Dutch parents are choosing markedly shorter baby names than they did a half-century ago, with boys' names shrinking twice as fast as girls' names and becoming more uniform across the country, accor
description_zh: 与半个世纪前相比，荷兰父母给孩子取的名字明显更短，男孩名字缩短的速度是女孩名字的两倍，而且全国各地的名字也越来越趋于统一。

title: Two Rotterdam trams crash on Erasmus Bridge; At least 15 hurt
title_zh: 两辆鹿特丹有轨电车在伊拉斯谟桥相撞；至少15人受伤
description: Two RET trams collided on the Erasmus Bridge in the center of Rotterdam on Wednesday morning.
description_zh: 周三上午，两辆RET有轨电车在鹿特丹市中心的伊拉斯谟桥上相撞。

title: Three arrested over €5m smartphone heist near Schiphol
title_zh: 三人因涉嫌在史基浦机场附近抢劫价值 500 万欧元的智能手机而被捕。
description: Three men have been arrested over the theft of a shipment of smartphones with an estimated street value of around...
description_zh: 三名男子因涉嫌盗窃一批智能手机而被捕，这批手机的估计街头价值约为……

title: Two trams collide on Rotterdam’s Erasmus Bridge, 15 injured
title_zh: 两辆电车在鹿特丹伊拉斯谟桥相撞，15人受伤
description: Fifteen people were injured, one of them seriously, when two trams collided on the Erasmus Bridge in Rotterdam on Wednesday...
description_zh: 周三，两辆有轨电车在鹿特丹伊拉斯谟桥上相撞，造成15人受伤，其中一人伤势严重……

title: Rijn river's water level rose slightly, Maas still decreasing steadily
title_zh: 莱茵河水位略有上升，马斯河水位则继续稳步下降。
description: The discharge of the Rijn river at the border with Germany has increased slightly, Rijkswaterstaat reported in its latest drought monitor.
description_zh: 荷兰公共工程和水资源管理部在其最新的干旱监测报告中指出，莱茵河在与德国接壤的河段流量略有增加。

title: Dutch gov't trying diplomacy via Sierra Leone's neighbors to get Bolle Jos extradited
title_zh: 荷兰政府试图通过塞拉利昂邻国进行外交斡旋，以促成博莱·乔斯的引渡。
description: The Netherlands is increasing diplomatic pressure on Sierra Leone to apprehend fugitive Jos Leijdekkers, this time through the African country’s neighbors, the Telegraaf
description_zh: 荷兰正加大对塞拉利昂的外交压力，要求其抓捕逃犯约斯·莱德克斯，此次施压是通过塞拉利昂的邻国《电讯报》进行的。

title: Dutch influencer arrested for walking around naked on Greek island
title_zh: 一名荷兰网红因在希腊岛上裸体行走而被捕
description: Dutch influencer Samuel Onuha (26), the founder of the clothing brand ICON.Amsterdam, was arrested on the Greek island of Mykonos for public nudity.
description_zh: 荷兰网红 Samuel Onuha（26 岁），服装品牌 ICON.Amsterdam 的创始人，因在希腊米科诺斯岛公共场合裸露身体而被捕。

title: Man jailed for 15 months over threats to Groningen butchers
title_zh: 男子因威胁格罗宁根肉店老板被判入狱15个月
description: A Groningen court has sentenced a 23-year-old man to 15 months in prison for sending death threats to butchers in...
description_zh: 格罗宁根一家法院判处一名23岁男子15个月监禁，罪名是向肉铺老板发送死亡威胁……

title: House prices rising fastest in Groningen, slowest in Amsterdam
title_zh: 格罗宁根的房价涨幅最快，阿姆斯特丹的房价涨幅最慢。
description: House prices are climbing fastest in Groningen and slowest in the Randstad, figures from the national statistics office CBS and...
description_zh: 根据国家统计局CBS的数据，格罗宁根的房价上涨速度最快，兰斯塔德的房价上涨速度最慢……

title: Dutch government warns against travel to the Middle East
title_zh: 荷兰政府警告民众不要前往中东旅行。
description: As the conflict between the US and Iran escalates, the foreign affairs ministry has tightened its advice for people wanting...
description_zh: 随着美伊冲突升级，外交部加强了对希望前往伊朗的人员的建议……

title: Explosive attacks fall as task force targets young offenders
title_zh: 专案组重点打击青少年罪犯，爆炸袭击事件减少
description: Attacks using explosives fell by more than 17% in the first half of this year, the first substantial drop since...
description_zh: 今年上半年，使用爆炸物的袭击事件下降了超过17%，这是自……以来的首次大幅下降。

title: Van Weel in Ghana to rally West African pressure on Bolle Jos
title_zh: 范维尔在加纳集结西非力量，向博莱·乔斯施压
description: The Netherlands is trying to build a coalition of West African countries to pressure Sierra Leone into handing over fugitive...
description_zh: 荷兰正试图联合西非国家，向塞拉利昂施压，迫使其交出逃犯……

title: Walkers underway on 2nd day of Vierdaagse; 805 drop-outs, 12 disqualifications on day 1
title_zh: 维尔达格斯步行赛第二天比赛正在进行中；第一天共有805人退赛，12人被取消资格。
description: Participants of the Nijmegen Vierdaagse have set off for the second day of the walking event. On day one, 805 people dropped out of the four-day walk, and 12 people were disqualified.
description_zh: 奈梅亨四日徒步活动的参与者们已经出发，开始了第二天的徒步之旅。在第一天的比赛中，共有805人退出了为期四天的徒步活动，另有12人被取消了参赛资格。

title: Rotterdam area faces major traffic chaos as key bridge closes for nine months
title_zh: 鹿特丹地区因一座重要桥梁封闭九个月而面临严重的交通混乱
description: Hundreds of kilometers of new asphalt will be laid across the Netherlands this summer as many roads, viaducts, and bridges reach the end of their lifespan.
description_zh: 今年夏天，荷兰将铺设数百公里的新沥青路面，因为许多道路、高架桥和桥梁都已达到使用寿命的终点。

title: Dutch home prices increased 4 percent year-on-year in June
title_zh: 荷兰6月份房价同比上涨4%。
description: The prices of existing owner-occupied homes were on average 4 percent higher in June than in the same month a year earlier, Statistics Netherlands (CBS) and the Land Registry reported.
description_zh: 荷兰统计局 (CBS) 和土地登记处报告称，6 月份现有自住房屋的价格平均比去年同期上涨了 4%。

title: Young man shot dead near Vierdaagse party in Nijmegen; Suspect arrested
title_zh: 奈梅亨 Vierdaagse 派对附近一名年轻人被枪杀；嫌疑人被捕
description: A young man was gunned down in Nijmegen on Tuesday night, just outside the area where the Vierdaagsefeesten were taking place. He died in the hospital. The police arrested a suspect.
description_zh: 周二晚间，一名年轻男子在奈梅亨遭枪击身亡，事发地点就在维尔达格斯节举办区域附近。他送医后不治身亡。警方已逮捕一名嫌疑人。

title: Netherlands advises against traveling to Middle East as U.S.-Iran war continues
title_zh: 由于美伊战争仍在持续，荷兰建议民众不要前往中东旅行。
description: The Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs has tightened its travel advisories for several countries in the Middle East as the United States and Iran continue to wage war.
description_zh: 由于美国和伊朗之间的战争仍在继续，荷兰外交部收紧了对中东几个国家的旅行警告。

title: Fewer explosive attacks in first half of 2026 after years of increase
title_zh: 2026年上半年爆炸袭击事件数量在多年增长后将减少。
description: In the first six months of this year, there were 581 attacks or attempted attacks using explosives in the Netherlands, the Offensive against Explosive Attacks task force
description_zh: 今年上半年，荷兰共发生581起使用爆炸物的袭击或未遂袭击事件，这是荷兰反爆炸袭击工作组的数据。

title: Man arrested after fatal shooting near Vierdaagse festivities
title_zh: 男子在维尔达格斯节庆活动附近开枪致人死亡后被捕
description: Police in Nijmegen have arrested a man in connection with a fatal shooting on Tuesday evening, just outside the area...
description_zh: 奈梅亨警方逮捕了一名男子，该男子涉嫌周二晚间在该地区附近发生的一起致命枪击案……

title: Video: Escaped wallaby captured and returned to owner in Middenmeer
title_zh: 视频：在米登米尔，一只逃跑的小袋鼠被抓获并送回主人身边
description: An escaped wallaby was captured Sunday evening in Middenmeer, Noord-Holland. A passerby first spotted the small kangaroo near the local soccer club.
description_zh: 周日晚上，一只逃脱的小袋鼠在北荷兰省米登梅尔被捕获。一名路人最先在当地足球俱乐部附近发现了这只小袋鼠。

title: Giant vegetated rock complex with hotel and exhibition spaces planned for Rotterdam Zuid
title_zh: 鹿特丹南区计划建造一座巨型植被覆盖的岩石综合体，内设酒店和展览空间。
description: Rotterdam’s future skyline may soon gain a new architectural landmark after MVRDV’s “Rotterdam Rocks” was selected as the winning design for the Shift Landmark competition.
description_zh: MVRDV 设计的“鹿特丹岩石”在 Shift Landmark 竞赛中胜出，鹿特丹未来的天际线可能很快就会迎来一个新的建筑地标。

title: Police catch 27 drunk drivers leaving the Zwarte Cross festival
title_zh: 警方在黑十字架节结束后查获27名醉酒司机
description: Police caught 27 drivers under the influence of alcohol after the Zwarte Cross festival on Monday, Omroep Gelderland
description_zh: Omroep Gelderland 周一 Zwarte Cross 音乐节后，警方抓获了 27 名醉酒司机

title: Netherlands to host Padel European Championship next year
title_zh: 荷兰将于明年举办欧洲板式网球锦标赛
description: The European Padel Championship will take place in the Netherlands next year. The first two phases of the tournament are in early March, with the final week running from July 7 to 11.
description_zh: 欧洲板式网球锦标赛将于明年在荷兰举行。比赛的前两个阶段将于3月初举行，决赛阶段将于7月7日至11日举行。

title: Sweltering heat sparked surge in insects in North Holland
title_zh: 北荷兰酷暑导致昆虫数量激增
description: Sweltering summer heat has accelerated insect reproduction across Noord-Holland, prompting a sharp rise in pest control calls as colonies of ants, moths, flies and other insects expand rapidly, exp
description_zh: 北荷兰省酷热的夏季加速了昆虫的繁殖，导致害虫防治电话激增，蚂蚁、飞蛾、苍蝇和其他昆虫的群体迅速扩张。

title: Petrol prices approaching new record as Iran war continues
title_zh: 伊朗战争持续，汽油价格逼近新纪录。
description: The price of petrol at gas stations in the Netherlands is approaching another record.
description_zh: 荷兰加油站的汽油价格正逼近又一个历史新高。

title: Video: Major fire breaks out on roof of historic Roermond building
title_zh: 视频：鲁尔蒙德历史建筑屋顶发生重大火灾
description: A large fire broke out Tuesday morning in the roof of a historic building containing apartments in central Roermond.
description_zh: 周二上午，鲁尔蒙德市中心一栋历史悠久的公寓楼屋顶发生大火。

title: Dutch Police seize servers of Motherless, porn site known for sexual abuse content
title_zh: 荷兰警方查封了以性虐待内容而闻名的色情网站 Motherless 的服务器。
description: Dutch police seized servers belonging to the hosting company behind the pornographic website Motherless during raids in Steenbergen, Rotterdam, and Amsterdam on Tuesday.
description_zh: 周二，荷兰警方在斯滕贝亨、鹿特丹和阿姆斯特丹的突袭行动中，查获了色情网站 Motherless 背后的托管公司的服务器。
